purpose_context: Today doctrine org init only writes a minimal three-file skeleton. Operators who create their own doctrine need that same command extended so they can optionally initialise from an existing template (local path or git URL with branch): honour .templateignore, validate the org name, substitute identity and registration-path tokens, and write the full rendered tree to a distinct pack destination—while keeping the minimal scaffold when no template is supplied.
purpose_tldr: Extend doctrine org init so operators creating their own doctrine can render from a local or git template with validated ORG_NAME, LOCAL_PATH, and .templateignore.
source_description: Extend spec-kitty doctrine org init for operators who create their own doctrine: optional TEMPLATE (local/git), ORG_NAME validation, LOCAL_PATH substitution, .templateignore, PACK_PATH as distinct destination; minimal scaffold when TEMPLATE omitted.
